criteria.reason: Monthly impact report aggregates active pattern events.
Report includes totals and key causes.
Patterns are classified into action candidates without auto-action.
Telegram command and menu button added.
Superadmin monthly digest includes impact block.
HITL disable and revision buttons are wired.
Relevant tests and production smoke checks passed.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_industry_patterns.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py tests/test_service_problem_regeneration.py tests/test_worker_services_quality.py tests/test_content_plan_generation.py
production: syntax ok, restart app worker, restart telegram bot, HTTP/log smoke checks
